source_jobs.title: Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING SOFTWARE ENGINEER (MID–SENIOR LEVEL)




Why Zania

Every enterprise spends millions of dollars on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC). It's one of the most critical, yet universally painful, parts of running a business. For decades, this industry has been dominated by legacy systems with notoriously low NPS scores, making it totally ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) to solve this massive problem. We are on a rocketship trajectory, creating intelligent agents that automate and augment the most complex risk and compliance workflows. We have found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling our team very quickly. Some reasons to join Zania are:

 - Dream Customers: Our customers are the most notable enterprises in the world, including FAANG, Big 4 firms and a portfolio of top customers.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Funded by a leading Tier 1 venture capital fund, giving us the resources to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: Zania is hiring the best. Our team includes AI and Security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Bain & Company, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building the next generation of agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: We have seen 10x ARR growth in the last year and are rapidly expanding.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.



The Role:

As a Software Engineer, you will be a core member of our engineering team, building the backend systems that power both our core product and our agentic AI platform. This is a backend-focused role for engineers who thrive on solving challenges at a massive scale; full-stack experience is a strong plus. You will design, build, and deploy the critical infrastructure and services that handle everything from petabyte-scale data retrieval to running thousand-step AI agents. This is a unique opportunity to tackle some of the most demanding problems in computing today and build systems with government-level security and reliability.



What You'll Do:

 - Engineer Core Product Features: Take ownership of building and delivering scalable, secure backend services that directly power our user-facing product.

 - Build Petabyte-Scale AI Pipelines: Design and implement robust systems for retrieval over petabyte-scale document troves and engineer pipelines for large-scale data collection.

 - Develop Advanced Agentic Systems: Build the backend infrastructure for complex, 1000-step planning agents that help companies with critical processes, and create organizational-level interfaces for human-AI collaboration.

 - Contribute to the architecture and management of our cloud infrastructure, ensuring high availability and performance.

 - Engineer systems with the highest standards of security and reliability to protect the world's most sensitive data.



What We're Looking For:

 - Experience: 5+ years of professional software engineering experience (not intended for recent graduates).

 - Proven Technical Impact: A demonstrated track record of delivering complex, high-quality backend systems.

 - Product Building Experience: You have a history of building and launching robust products or platforms, ideally in a hyper-growth or 0-to-1 startup environment.

 - Deep Technical Expertise: You are a hands-on, highly technical backend engineer with proficiency in:

 - Python: For building robust backend services and AI pipelines.

 - Large-Scale Systems: Experience with distributed systems, large-scale data processing (e.g., Spark), and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP).

 - TypeScript and React: Experience is a plus for contributing across the stack but is not required.

 - Ownership and Drive: You take full ownership of your projects, demonstrating a strong bias for action and the ability to manage complex priorities in a fast-paced environment.

 - Pragmatic Problem-Solving:

source_jobs.title: Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
Operations Manager

Why Zania

Every enterprise spends millions of dollars on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC). It's one of the most critical, yet universally painful, parts of running a business. For decades, this industry has been dominated by legacy systems with notoriously low NPS scores, making it totally ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for GRC to solve this massive problem. We are on a rocketship trajectory, creating intelligent agents that automate and augment the most complex risk and compliance workflows. We have found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling our team very quickly. Some reasons to join Zania are:

 - Dream Customers: Our customers are the most notable enterprises in the world, including FAANG, Big 4 firms and a portfolio of top customers.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Funded by a leading Tier 1 venture capital fund, giving us the resources to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: Zania is hiring the best. Our team includes AI and security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building the next generation of agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: We have seen 10x ARR growth in the last year and are rapidly expanding.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.

Role Overview

This is a recruiting-first role, with an operational layer on top. You will own the engine that fills our pipeline — sourcing exceptional candidates at high volume, moving them through the process thoughtfully and efficiently, and coordinating seamless virtual and onsite interview experiences. But your job does not stop at the offer. As we grow, you will also help build the operational infrastructure that supports our expanding team's high performance — tracking projects, maintaining visibility across initiatives, and ensuring the systems that bring great people in are matched by systems that help them thrive.

You will work directly alongside the founder across both hiring and day-to-day operations. We are looking for someone who genuinely cares about the candidate experience and the team experience in equal measure — someone who understands that finding exceptional people is only half the job, and that helping create high-performance teams is the other half.

This role requires 5 days per week, onsite in our Palo Alto office. We are not considering remote or hybrid arrangements at this time.



What You'll Do

Recruiting & Sourcing

 - Source exceptional candidates at high volume across LinkedIn, GitHub, and other channels — proactive outreach is the core of this role, not reactive inbound management.

 - Build and maintain sourcing lists, sequences, and outreach cadences to keep pipeline full across multiple open roles simultaneously.

 - Screen inbound applicants and qualify candidates through thoughtful initial conversations before passing to hiring managers.

 - Own interview scheduling end-to-end — coordinating availability, managing virtual and onsite logistics, and making sure every interview experience reflects well on Zania.

 - Keep candidates warm and engaged throughout the process; a great candidate experience is something we take pride in.

 - Maintain clean, accurate data in our ATS at all times — pipeline hygiene is a non-negotiable.

 - Partner with hiring managers on role intake, scorecards, and structured interview processes.

Project Management & Operations

 - Own project tracking across teams — maintain visibility into open initiatives, follow up on deliverables, and flag anything at risk of slipping.

 - Build and manage lightweight operational systems (task management, SOPs, internal documentation) that help a fast-growing team stay coordinated and supported.

 - Support the founder and leadership team with scheduling, coordination, and execution of cross-functional priorities.

 - Handle operational tasks ac

source_jobs.title: GRC Engineer
source_jobs.description:
GRC Engineer

Why Zania

Every enterprise spends millions of dollars on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC). It's one of the most critical, yet universally painful, parts of running a business. For decades, this industry has been dominated by legacy systems with notoriously low NPS scores, making it totally ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) to solve this massive problem. We are on a rocketship trajectory, creating intelligent agents that automate and augment the most complex risk and compliance workflows. We have found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling our team very quickly. Some reasons to join Zania are:

 - Dream Customers: Our customers are the most notable enterprises in the world, including FAANG, Big 4 firms and a portfolio of top customers.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Funded by a leading Tier 1 venture capital fund — Series A led by NEA, with Anthropic and Menlo Ventures. $18M raised to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: Zania is hiring the best. Our team includes AI and Security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Bain & Company, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building the next generation of agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: We have seen 10x ARR growth in the last year and are rapidly expanding.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.

The Role

As a GRC Engineer at Zania, you are the bridge between our product and the enterprises that depend on it. You are not a support function — you are a compliance authority and a closer. You own the customer relationship from first implementation through a defined, measurable finish line, and you are accountable for getting them there.

You will set clear success goals with every customer on day one, work backwards from those goals to drive the engagement, and know exactly when you’ve landed the outcome you both committed to. Once a customer is live and successful, you transition them to a steady state and move your energy to the next challenge. You don’t let engagements drift — you drive them to done.

In parallel, everything you learn in the field comes back into the product. Your pattern recognition across customer implementations will directly shape Zania’s roadmap.

What You’ll Do

 - Set the success contract upfront. In every new engagement, establish explicit, measurable goals with the customer before work begins — and align the entire implementation plan to hitting those milestones. No ambiguity about what “done” looks like.

 - Own implementations end-to-end and close them. Lead onboarding and deployment for enterprise customers from scoping and configuration through to a defined, celebrated go-live. You drive the engagement to closure — you don’t let it become an open-ended managed service.

 - Be the GRC expert in the room. Serve as the primary compliance authority in all customer conversations. When a CISO or VP of Risk asks a hard question about how Zania maps to their control framework, you answer it — with precision and credibility.

 - Transition to steady state and monitor. Once a customer has hit their success goals, transition them to a lightweight monitoring cadence. Check in, track outcomes, flag risks early — but protect your bandwidth for the next implementation.

 - Drive product feedback. Synthesize what you hear across implementations into structured, prioritized product insights. Bring them directly to our product and engineering teams. Your input will shape the roadmap.

 - Build the implementation playbook. As an early team member, define how Zania implementations work at scale — the processes, templates, success metrics, and handoff criteria the team will run on as we grow.

 - Support pre-sales. Partner with the sales team on technical discovery and proof-of-concept engagements for strategic prospects, helping close deals

source_jobs.title: Social Media & Growth Marketer
source_jobs.description:
SOCIAL MEDIA & GROWTH MARKETER




Why Zania

Every enterprise spends millions of dollars on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC). It's one of the most critical, yet universally painful, parts of running a business. For decades, this industry has been dominated by legacy systems with notoriously low NPS scores, making it totally ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) to solve this massive problem. We are on a rocketship trajectory, creating intelligent agents that automate and augment the most complex risk and compliance workflows. We have found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling our team very quickly. Some reasons to join Zania are:

 - Dream Customers: Our customers are the most notable enterprises in the world, including FAANG, Big 4 firms and a portfolio of top customers.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Funded by a leading Tier 1 venture capital fund, giving us the resources to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: Zania is hiring the best. Our team includes AI and Security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Bain & Company, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building the next generation of agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: We have seen 10x ARR growth in the last year and are rapidly expanding.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.



Role Overview

This isn’t a traditional marketing role. It’s a creative challenge.
Zania is growing fast. We’re not interested in doing what everyone else in GRC is doing — the same LinkedIn carousel posts, the same “AI is transforming compliance” takes, the same forgettable content. We need someone who thinks differently and executes fast.
You’ll own Zania’s social presence and be responsible for making us impossible to ignore in the enterprise security and GRC space — with bold ideas, sharp creative instincts, and zero tolerance for generic.


What You’ll Do

 - Own our social voice: Build and run Zania’s network and presence across LinkedIn and other channels. You’ll develop a distinct point of view that cuts through the noise — not just scheduled posts.

 - Generate bold, original ideas: We don’t want a playbook. We want creativity that makes GRC and security leaders stop scrolling. Surprise us.

 - Move fast: Low budget, high output. You’ll concept, create, and publish with short turnarounds. No waiting for agencies or approval chains.

 - Stay enterprise-relevant: Bold doesn’t mean reckless. Everything should be credible and land with a senior enterprise audience — CISOs, compliance leads, risk officers.

 - Collaborate closely with founders: You’ll work directly with us to shape how Zania shows up in the world. This is a high-trust, high-autonomy role.

What We Care About

 - You have a sharp creative instinct and can back it up with work — show us, don’t tell us.

 - You’re not afraid to try things that haven’t been done in this space before.

 - You understand LinkedIn, X, YouTube and other channels or are hungry to master them fast.

 - You can execute independently with little to no budget.

 - You have taste. You know the difference between content that earns attention and content that fills a calendar.

Minimum Qualifications

 - Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience

 - 2+ years of experience in social media, content marketing, or growth marketing, with a portfolio demonstrating original, high-quality creative work

 - Proven ability to independently concept, create, and publish content across LinkedIn for a professional or enterprise audience

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills — you will craft Zania's public voice and your work must resonate credibly with senior enterprise buyers including CISOs and compliance leaders

How to Apply
Skip the resume. Send us one piece of social

source_jobs.title: Applied AI Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Why Zania

Every enterprise spends millions on Governance, Risk, and Compliance. It's one of the most critical — and most painful — parts of running a business. The industry has been dominated by legacy platforms with notoriously low NPS scores for decades. It's completely ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for GRC to solve this problem. We're building intelligent agents that execute complex risk and compliance workflows with full explainability — not dashboards, not copilots, but agents that do the work. We've found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling fast.

Why join:

 - Dream Customers: FAANG companies, Big 4 firms, and a portfolio of the world's most notable enterprises.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Series A led by NEA, with Anthropic and Menlo Ventures. $18M raised to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: AI and security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Bain, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: 10x ARR growth in the last year.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.

The role

You will build AI systems designed to outperform the world's leading experts in Governance, Risk, and Compliance. Not research. Not prototypes. Production systems with a fanatical focus on accuracy, explainability, and responsible design. You will own the AI-native products that set a new global standard for GRC.

We use an in-person work model and offer relocation assistance.

What you'll do

 - Build & fine-tune models. Fine-tune foundation models on proprietary data and implement novel techniques to achieve world-class accuracy on complex GRC tasks.

 - Develop AI-native workflows. Build sophisticated, multi-step agentic workflows that automate complex GRC processes — from risk assessment to compliance monitoring to evidence collection.

 - Champion responsible AI. Implement and pioneer methods for AI explainability and safety. Our systems must be transparent, auditable, and fair. This is non-negotiable in our domain.

 - Drive innovation. Rapidly prototype, evaluate, and integrate state-of-the-art research (agents, RAG, new architectures) into reliable, production-grade features.

Representative projects

 - Build an AI agent that analyzes thousands of regulatory documents and internal controls, identifying compliance gaps with higher accuracy than a team of human experts.

 - Develop an explainable AI system for risk assessment, allowing auditors and executives to understand and trust the AI's reasoning on high-stakes decisions.

 - Build an advanced RAG pipeline over a massive corpus of unstructured company data to produce precise, verifiable assessments against complex compliance requirements.

 - Partner with GRC subject matter experts to create ground-truth datasets for tasks like third-party risk evaluation, then fine-tune models that become the industry standard.

What you have

 - 3+ years in an applied AI or machine learning engineering role.

 - Proven product sense. You've shipped reliable, production-scale ML products. You know how to use offline evaluation and online experimentation to achieve high-performance results.

 - Hands-on applied AI expertise. Direct experience building with LLMs — fine-tuning, RAG, and agentic systems. Not theoretical. You've put these into production.

 - High agency. You take full ownership of outcomes, move with a bias for action, and have a relentless drive for world-class accuracy. You see constraints as design problems, not blockers.

 - Strong communication. You can work closely with security and GRC research counterparts and articulate technical tradeoffs clearly.

Minimum Qualifications

 - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience

 - 3+ years of experience in applied AI, machine learning engineering, or a related te

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
FOUNDING ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE




Why Zania Every enterprise spends millions of dollars on Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC). It's one of the most critical, yet universally painful, parts of running a business. For decades, this industry has been dominated by legacy systems with notoriously low NPS scores, making it totally ripe for disruption.

Zania is building agentic AI for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) to solve this massive problem. We are on a rocketship trajectory, creating intelligent agents that automate and augment the most complex risk and compliance workflows. We have found exceptional product-market fit and are scaling our team very quickly. Some reasons to join Zania are:


 - Dream Customers: Our customers are the most notable enterprises in the world, including FAANG, Big 4 firms and a portfolio of top customers.

 - Tier 1 Backing: Funded by a leading Tier 1 venture capital fund, giving us the resources to build a generational company.

 - World-Class Team: Zania is hiring the best. Our team includes AI and Security leaders from Airbnb, Microsoft, Bain & Company, Deloitte, PwC, Brex, and Instacart.

 - Pioneering Technology: Our engineers and GRC experts work at the absolute forefront of applied AI, building the next generation of agentic systems that will define the future of compliance.

 - Hyper-Growth: We have seen 10x ARR growth in the last year and are rapidly expanding.

 - Competitive Compensation & Equity.

Role Overview As our Founding Account Executive, you will be the driving force behind our early revenue engine. You will work directly with the founders to transition from founder-led sales to a scalable Go-To-Market motion. This is a true 0-to-1 role: you won't be handed a neatly packaged pipeline. You will be responsible for full-cycle sales—from hunting and generating your own leads to navigating complex enterprise procurement processes and closing six-figure deals. If you are a builder who thrives on the thrill of the hunt and wants to shape the sales playbook of an AI rocketship, this is for you.

What You'll Do

 - Drive Full-Cycle Sales: Own the entire sales process from outbound prospecting and lead generation to discovery, demo, negotiation, and closing.

 - Generate Your Own Pipeline: Act as your own SDR by researching target accounts, executing outbound campaigns, and building a robust pipeline of enterprise prospects.

 - Define the Playbook: Partner with the founders to refine our ICP (Ideal Customer Profile), test different messaging, and build the foundational sales playbook for future hires.

 - Navigate Complex Deals: Manage multi-stakeholder enterprise deals involving GRC leaders, CISOs, and IT procurement teams.

 - Voice of the Customer: Act as a critical feedback loop to our Product and Engineering teams, translating customer pain points into actionable product insights.

What You Have

 - Experience: 5+ years of B2B SaaS sales experience, with a proven track record of closing complex, six-figure enterprise deals.

 - Hunter Mentality: Demonstrated success in generating your own leads and building pipeline from scratch without relying heavily on inbound marketing.

 - Domain Knowledge: Previous experience selling into Security, Compliance, Risk, or AI domains is a massive plus.

 - Startup DNA: Comfortable operating in a highly ambiguous, fast-paced Series A environment where you must build the parachute on the way down.

 - Location: Based in (or willing to relocate to) Palo Alto, working in-person with the team five days a week.

Minimum Qualifications

 - Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience

 - 5+ years of B2B SaaS sales experience, with a demonstrated track record of closing six-figure enterprise deals end-to-end

 - Proven ability to independently generate pipeline through outbound prospecting — not solely reliant on inbound leads

 - Exceptional written and verbal communication skills — you will navigate multi-stakeholder enterprise deals with GRC leader

source_jobs.description:
